entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The comprehensive management of land and water resources within a watershed to improve agricultural productivity.

entities.name: RAINFED AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural production that relies exclusively on rainfall for water supply.

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The measure of agricultural production per unit area.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID AND DRY LAND AREAS
entities.description: Geographic regions characterized by low precipitation and water scarcity.

entities.name: WATERSHED PROGRAMS
entities.description: Structured initiatives designed to manage and develop watershed resources for improved returns.

entities.name: RETURN ON INVESTMENT
entities.description: The financial gain or efficiency of investment in agricultural projects.

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers who manage small plots of land, typically in developing countries.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: A country in South Asia where watershed methods have been successful.

entities.name: AFRICAN COUNTRIES
entities.description: Various nations in Africa where watershed methods have been successful.

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agricultural practices that maintain productivity without depleting natural resources.

entities.name: WATER AND NATURAL RESOURCES MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The strategic planning and management of water and other natural assets.

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Techniques used to conserve soil and optimize water use in agriculture.

entities.name: WATERSHED DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the ecological and economic state of a watershed.
